chunks.title: Oracle Against Ariel
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic judgment against Jerusalem using the metaphor of a lion's den.

chunks.title: Judgment on Spiritual Apathy
chunks.reason: A direct address describing the people's spiritual blindness and God's response.

chunks.title: Counsel of Men and Future Restoration
chunks.reason: A transition from rebuking hidden counsel to the promise of future restoration and understanding.
